description: AI agent skill and MCP server docs for Xquik's X Twitter scraper API and X API alternative: tweet search, follower export, social listening, user lookup, extraction, monitoring, webhooks, exports, writes, SDK links, and 33x cheaper tweet reads.
rules: Use README.md for installation, cost comparison, SDK links, API coverage, and MCP setup.
Use skills/x-twitter-scraper/SKILL.md as the primary agent operating guide.
Use skills/*/SKILL.md for task-specific workflows such as search, extraction, monitoring, webhooks, posting, and DMs.
Keep implementation details public-safe; use Xquik API, read service, write service, or browser service wording.
